base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of playables_14_batch — a character (playable) from 1994 final fantasy vi. 14 playable characters — Terra (half-esper)/Locke (thief)/Edgar (machinist)/Sabin (martial artist twin)/Celes (magitek knight)/Cyan (samurai)/Shadow (ninja)/Gau (child of wild)/Setzer (gambler)/Mog (moogle)/Strago (mage)/Relm (painter)/Umaro (yeti)/Gogo (mime) + Leo (temp story). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 14 playable characters — Terra (half-esper)/Locke (thief)/Edgar (machinist)/Sabin (martial artist twin)/Celes (magitek knight)/Cyan (samurai)/Shadow (ninja)/Gau (child of wild)/Setzer (gambler)/Mog (moogle)/Strago (mage)/Relm (painter)/Umaro (yeti)/Gogo (mime) + Leo (temp story)
